reason: Both correctly diagnose the low conversion rate as normal for TOFU traffic and recommend BOFU content as the primary lever while cautioning against gating. B better covers the "check which existing pages convert" key point by making it an explicit first step, whereas A only mentions revisiting top-traffic posts for CTA tuning rather than for replicating high-converting content. B also adds a useful ICP-fit caveat. Both are similarly concise and actionable.
